name: Low Cal Pumpkin Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened cream cheese, 2 tablespoons granulated sugar replacement (I use granulated fructose), vanilla extract, and 1 egg in a bowl. Stir well.
2. Spread the mixture into the bottom of the pie shell.
3. In a mixing bowl or work bowl of processor, combine the pumpkin puree, evaporated skim milk, remaining ingredients (2 eggs, 2 tablespoons granulated sugar replacement, cinnamon, ground nutmeg, and ginger). Beat or process until well blended.
4. Carefully pour the mixture over the prepared shell.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 65-70 minutes, or until a tester comes out clean.
Calories per 1/8 pie: 173 (filling), 120 (shell) - Total, 293
Diabetic exchanges: 1 bread, 1 fat (for the filling): 1 high-fat meat, 1 fat, 1/2 fruit source
Dessert Cookbook. Reposted 4 you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
